In my case not really lol Soz i switched the channel cuz I’ve been living in somewhere else for too long and I can barely express myself through canto now... like you said you guys get along pretty well when in person.. so basically your partner still having connection with you. replies.msg:
If she was next to me and texting with the other guy.. of course my jealousy will pop up and my mind will definitely generate a sort of unhappiness. That’s why I went like communication matters... just need to talk to your partner about this issue rather than hiding it.. otherwise you will get it explode when your psychological repression ain’t working anymore.

I guess everyone has standards and knowing the distance between oneself and its friends... and it can be weird if your partner goes like completely ignorant to you during nights. The point is how you perceive others’ reaction and action and how you turn a particular situation to be the better one - for both of you guys.
